title: Plug Power targets 13%-15% 2026 sales growth while aiming for positive EBITDAS in Q4
text: Plug Power provided full year 2026 sales growth guidance of 13%-15%, with expectations that the first half will be in the 40% range in context of the overall guidance. The company remains focused on achieving positive EBITDAS in Q4 2026, supported by revenue growth, margin expansion, improved unit economics, hydrogen fuel margin gains, disciplined capital deployment, and conversion of its electrolyzer and hydrogen project pipeline into profitable growth. Electrolyzer revenue increased significantly, growing from $9.2 million in the first quarter of 2025 to $40.8 million in the first quarter of 2026. The company delivered a record $187 million revenue year for electrolyzers in 2025. Management expects continued growth across material handling, GenEco electrolyzers, cryogenic equipment, and hydrogen fuel, with Plug having established strong platforms for expansion in 2026.
